summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Jobflow updates including right panel social links, sponsorship badge improvements, manual override functionality, and Kanban context menu. Backend APIs working at 95.1% success rate (39/41 tests), frontend UI fully functional with all expected new features implemented correctly.

minor_notes.impact: Expected behavior - Interview Prep feature was removed in previous updates
Expected behavior - no test notifications exist in system

design_issues.issue: Context menu buttons (... button) have opacity: 0 by default, only visible on hover
design_issues.impact: Users may not discover context menu functionality easily
design_issues.note: This appears to be intentional design choice based on code implementation

passed_tests: ✅ NEW FEATURE: Right panel social links correctly implemented (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok added)
✅ NEW FEATURE: Old fields correctly removed (Glassdoor, Funding dropdown, Tech Stack tags)
✅ NEW FEATURE: Notes field visible below social links in right panel
✅ NEW FEATURE: Backend PUT /api/jobs/{job_id}/company-profile accepts instagram_url, youtube_url, tiktok_url
✅ NEW FEATURE: Backend POST /api/sponsorship/recheck-all endpoint working (rechecked 1 job, updated 1)
✅ NEW FEATURE: Sponsorship badge text updated - shows 'Sponsors visas' (green) or 'No sponsor licence' (amber)
✅ NEW FEATURE: Sponsorship responses include matched_name for both found and not_found status
✅ NEW FEATURE: Manual sponsorship override via PUT /api/jobs/{id} with sponsorship field working
✅ NEW FEATURE: Sponsorship manual override toggle button present in right panel with hover functionality
✅ NEW FEATURE: Kanban context menu fully functional (... button with 'Move to' options for all columns)
✅ NEW FEATURE: Context menu move functionality working (tested moving card between columns)
✅ NEW FEATURE: Company logo fallback chain working (Clearbit → Google Favicon → Icon)
✅ Sponsorship auto-check on job creation working (Deloitte shows 'found', RandomCo shows 'not_found')
✅ UK Sponsorship checker with 140,851 records loaded and fuzzy matching working
✅ All existing features still working: Jobs CRUD, Contacts, CV upload, AI parsing, Gmail integration
✅ Auth system working correctly with session management
✅ All 6 phases from previous updates still functional (Company Intelligence, Notifications, ATS, Cover Letters)

success_percentage.backend: 95.1% (39/41 tests passed - 2 expected 404s for removed/non-existent features)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all new features working correctly with proper UI integration)
success_percentage.overall: 97.5% (comprehensive implementation success with minor design consideration)
